style: Brutalist punk-libertarian editorial design. Cream paper background, black ink, red accents, thick black borders, hard offset shadows, torn paper texture, zine layout, high contrast, bold type energy.

cards.name: Home
cards.prompt: Create a 1200x630 Open Graph image for The Radical Libertarian homepage. Huge bold headline: Freedom Is Not Supposed To Be Comfortable. Brutalist punk-libertarian editorial design, cream paper background, black and red palette, thick borders, hard shadows, zine texture, no official party logos.

cards.name: Manifesto
cards.prompt: Create a 1200x630 Open Graph image for The Radical Libertarian manifesto. Use a torn-paper declaration, black ink, red stamp accents, thick shadows, chaotic but premium editorial layout. No official logos, no fake seals.

cards.name: Essays
cards.prompt: Create a 1200x630 Open Graph image for a radical libertarian essay archive. Stacked zine pages, bold black typography, red highlights, cream background, hard shadows, philosophical grenade energy.

cards.name: Podcast
cards.prompt: Create a 1200x630 Open Graph image for The Radical Libertarian Podcast. Black microphone as signal flare, red sound waves, cream paper background, thick black borders, underground radio energy.

cards.name: Tools
cards.prompt: Create a 1200x630 Open Graph image for interactive liberty tools: scorecards, checklists, bingo, generators. Brutalist zine design, cream/black/red/yellow, thick borders, hard shadows.

cards.name: Resources
cards.prompt: Create a 1200x630 Open Graph image for a liberty resource library. Books, folders, index cards, maps, privacy tools, thick borders, cream/black/red palette, brutalist editorial layout.
